stories.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
stories.description: In the two months since the deadly strike, the Pentagon has said only that the incident is under investigation.

stories.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
stories.description: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.

stories.title: King Charles, Trump toast ties despite Iran tensions
stories.description: Britain's King Charles and Donald Trump hailed their countries' longstanding ties at a White House state dinner Tuesday -- despite the US president claiming the monarch agreed with him on Iran's nuclear weapons.

stories.title: Middle East peace talks stall amid Hormuz tensions, ceasefire violations in Lebanon
stories.description: Efforts to revive talks over the Middle East war have stalled as the US weighs Iran’s latest proposal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil route, while tensions in Lebanon continue to escalate despite a fragile ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah.

stories.description: The port has been a centrepiece of India's regional strategic ambitions. Now, those hopes are sinking.
